case_title: LUMBERMENS MUTUAL CASUALTY COMPANY VS. JOHN SMITH et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-13-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE NOV-27-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION OF ROBERT R. POINDEXTER IN RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUMBERMENS MUTUAL CASUALTY COMPANY
AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT DEFENDANT SUED HEREIN AS DOE`, 1 TO BE KELLY, MELISSA DEFENDANT SUED HEREIN AS DOE, 2 TO BE KELLY, WILLIAM

BUSINESS TORT, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUMBERMENS MUTUAL CASUALTY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, JOHN DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          OCT-18-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-16-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       SEP-19-2002
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR SEP-17-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
BEFORE HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. (212)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-13-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-18-2002 CONTINUED TO NOV-27-2002 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
